name: @rhombus-std/config
description: Layered configuration engine: ConfigurationBuilder/Root/Section, compareConfigurationKeys, the Memory provider, an index-navigable Section tree, and a runtime schema (Schema/Infer/OPTIONAL) that coerces on build().
//configuration-builder-subpath: Every provider package augments ConfigurationBuilder via `declare module "@rhombus-std/config/configuration-builder"`, NOT the barrel ("@rhombus-std/config") -- TS's declaration merging for a class re-exported through another module (`export { ConfigurationBuilder } from "./configuration-builder"` in ./src/index.ts) does not merge back onto the class as seen through the declaring module's own specifier. Augmenting the barrel directly works for exactly one augmenter, but the moment a SECOND package (or core's own addInMemoryCollection) also augments the class, TS sees two non-interchangeable 'ConfigurationBuilder' phantom types and errors on `return this` inside the prototype-assignment function -- reproduced and confirmed during config-json's build. In dev/source mode this subpath resolves to the real, separate ./src/configuration-builder.ts file (distinct from the ./src/index.ts barrel, which is what avoids the phantom-duplicate above); in the publishConfig below it collapses onto the SAME dist/index.d.ts as '.' (rollup-plugin-dts rolls everything into one file at publish time, so there's no separate compiled artifact for this subpath to point at, and none is needed -- a single flat file has no re-export chain to trip over). A provider's rolled-up dist/index.d.ts keeps `declare module "@rhombus-std/config/configuration-builder"` verbatim (respectExternal: true), so this subpath must exist in the PUBLISHED package.json too, not just here.
//configuration-manager-subpath: Same rationale as configuration-builder-subpath above, substituting ConfigurationManager for ConfigurationBuilder: every provider package now ALSO installs its augmentation onto ConfigurationManager (declare module + a second applyAugmentations call, see docs/decisions.md), so it must declare-merge onto `@rhombus-std/config/configuration-manager`, not the barrel, or the same phantom-duplicate-type error reappears. `./src/configuration-manager.ts` has no generic type parameter, so there's no TS2428 arity concern the way there is for ConfigurationBuilder<T>.

scripts.build: bun x tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && bun build.ts
